## Harness Checklist

- [ ] Strengthens portfolio, SEO service channel, or hiring signal
- [ ] Audience and page intent are clear
- [ ] README changes, if any, read as an external repository overview rather than internal notes
- [ ] README changes, if any, include Korean and English where reviewer context matters
- [ ] README was updated for any new or materially changed features, routes, services, architecture, integrations, or quality gates
- [ ] YJ CODE positioning reflects SaaS/product development and UI/UX quality, not only frontend implementation
- [ ] SEO metadata, headings, or internal links were considered where relevant
- [ ] Motion or visual changes support UX rather than distract from content
- [ ] Mobile layout and accessibility risks were considered
- [ ] Relevant checks were run or intentionally skipped with a note
